moments.title: World Cup Quarter-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 enters its thrilling Quarter-Final stage from tomorrow, with teams battling for a spot in the semis.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: It's do-or-die! The FIFA World Cup Quarter-Finals are here, starting tomorrow. Who are you backing to make it to the semis?

angles.name: Team Focus
angles.copy: If Scotland were still in it, we'd be glued! But the World Cup Quarter-Finals are set – who will claim glory?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, culminates this weekend with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries & Cream at the ready! It's Wimbledon Finals weekend. Who will lift the trophies on Centre Court?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The tension is building! Who's your pick for the Wimbledon Men's and Women's Champions this year?

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed, a celebration of motorsports and car culture, begins tomorrow and runs until July 12th.

angles.name: Event Kick-off
angles.copy: Engines revving! The Goodwood Festival of Speed kicks off tomorrow. Who's heading down to see the incredible cars and drivers?

angles.name: Speed & Style
angles.copy: From classic racers to futuristic concepts, Goodwood Festival of Speed is all about speed and style. What's your dream car to see on the hill climb?

moments.title: The Open Championship Golf
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's major tournaments, tees off next week at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Next week, golf's elite head to Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship. Who's your pick to win the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Golf Fans
angles.copy: The Open Championship is just a week away! Get ready for some world-class golf action. Will we see a new champion or a familiar face?

moments.title: Trying Season 5 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fifth season of the acclaimed British comedy-drama 'Trying', starring Rafe Spall and Esther Smith, premieres today on Apple TV+.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: It's back! 'Trying' Season 5 drops today on Apple TV+. Ready to catch up with Nikki and Jason's latest adventures?

angles.name: Weekend Binge Suggestion
angles.copy: Your weekend binge sorted! 'Trying' Season 5 is out now. Who else loves this heartwarming British comedy?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Remake
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic 'Little House on the Prairie' series arrives on Netflix tomorrow, July 9th.

angles.name: Nostalgia Hook
angles.copy: Get ready for a trip back in time! A new 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation lands on Netflix tomorrow. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Family Viewing
angles.copy: Perfect for family viewing! The beloved 'Little House on the Prairie' gets a fresh take on Netflix from July 9th. Who remembers the original?

moments.title: The Dark - ITV Thriller
moments.blurb: ITV's gripping new detective thriller 'The Dark', based on G.R. Halliday's novel, premieres on July 12th.

angles.name: New Drama Alert
angles.copy: Sunday night drama sorted! ITV's new thriller 'The Dark' starts July 12th. Get ready for some serious suspense.

angles.name: Weekend Watch
angles.copy: Looking for a new crime drama? 'The Dark' is coming to ITV this Sunday. Any fans of G.R. Halliday's books out there?

moments.title: Llangollen International Eisteddfod
moments.blurb: The International Eisteddfod in Llangollen, celebrating global music, dance, and culture, is currently underway until July 12th.

angles.name: Local Celebration
angles.copy: The Llangollen International Eisteddfod is in full swing! A fantastic celebration of culture right here in Wales. Have you visited yet?

angles.name: Global Talent
angles.copy: Bringing the world to Wales! The International Eisteddfod at Llangollen continues to showcase incredible talent until July 12th.

moments.title: Exmouth Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The free, family-focused Exmouth Festival starts tomorrow, running until July 12th, with live music, theatre, circus, and art across the town.

angles.name: Local Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Exmouth Festival begins tomorrow! Get ready for a fantastic few days of free music, art, and family fun. What are you most looking forward to?

angles.name: Devon Events
angles.copy: Don't miss out! Exmouth Festival is bringing the good vibes to Devon from July 9-12. Perfect for all ages!

moments.title: Happy 51st Jack White
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 9th, marks the 51st birthday of Jack White, the iconic frontman of The White Stripes and a prolific solo artist.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday tomorrow to the one and only Jack White! What's your favourite White Stripes track or solo hit?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow we celebrate Jack White turning 51! A true rock visionary. What's his most iconic riff?

moments.title: Happy 67th Jim Kerr
moments.blurb: Jim Kerr, the dynamic lead singer of Scottish rock band Simple Minds, celebrates his 67th birthday tomorrow, July 9th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Jim Kerr from Simple Minds turns 67! What's your favourite Simple Minds anthem?

angles.name: Scottish Icon
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Scottish legend Jim Kerr of Simple Minds tomorrow! Still delivering those epic performances.

moments.title: Happy 72nd Neil Tennant
moments.blurb: Neil Tennant, one half of the iconic synth-pop duo Pet Shop Boys, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 72nd Birthday to the legendary Neil Tennant of Pet Shop Boys on July 10th! What's your go-to Pet Shop Boys classic?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating Neil Tennant's 72nd birthday this Thursday! Pet Shop Boys have given us so many unforgettable tracks. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Happy 67th Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Richie Sambora, the legendary guitarist of Bon Jovi, turns 67 on July 11th.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to rock guitar hero Richie Sambora on July 11th! Those Bon Jovi solos are iconic. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Bon Jovi's Richie Sambora turning 67 this Saturday! So many classic tracks owe their sound to him.

moments.title: Happy 74th Liz Mitchell
moments.blurb: Liz Mitchell, the iconic lead singer of disco legends Boney M., celebrates her 74th birthday on July 12th.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Get down and boogie! The legendary Liz Mitchell of Boney M. turns 74 this Sunday. What's your favourite Boney M. hit?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to Boney M.'s incredible voice, Liz Mitchell, on July 12th! Still sounds amazing today.

moments.title: Happy 84th Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, the influential singer-songwriter and guitarist of The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to folk-rock pioneer Roger McGuinn of The Byrds on July 13th! His guitar work is legendary.

angles.name: Byrds Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger McGuinn's 84th birthday this Monday! The Byrds left an indelible mark on music.

moments.title: Happy 80th Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: The incomparable Linda Ronstadt, a true music icon spanning rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 14th.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the phenomenal Linda Ronstadt on July 14th! Her voice is pure magic across so many genres.

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Celebrating 80 years of Linda Ronstadt this Tuesday! So many beautiful songs. Which one is your all-time favourite?

moments.title: Happy 74th Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland of The Police on July 16th! That drumming is unmistakable.

angles.name: Police Power
angles.copy: Celebrating Stewart Copeland's 74th this Thursday! The rhythm behind so many classic hits. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Happy 77th Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Geezer Butler, the influential bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Icon
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the legendary Geezer Butler from Black Sabbath on July 17th! A true pioneer of heavy metal.

angles.name: Sabbath Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating Geezer Butler's 77th this Friday! The man behind some of rock's most iconic lyrics and basslines.

moments.title: Happy 85th Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the iconic Motown singer and leader of Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday on July 18th.

angles.name: Motown Legend
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incomparable Martha Reeves on July 18th! Dancing in the Street is still a classic.

angles.name: Soulful Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Martha Reeves' 85th this Saturday! Her voice defined an era. What's your favourite Vandellas track?
